The engine is in good condition: starts, drives and brakes smoothly - small scratch rear bumper and small damage mirror on the right (but not broken, see photos)

This example is finished in the exclusive color Schiefergrau Neo and has a full leather interior. With a mileage of only 10,000 kilometers, this Porsche presents itself as a particularly attractive example.

Under the tailgate is the modern six-cylinder boxer engine with an output of 394 hp, coupled to an automatic transmission. Thanks to the advanced engineering of the 992 generation, the car delivers impressive performance without compromising on comfort or ease of use.

The car is equipped with several popular options, including a front axle lift system and Matrix LED lighting. According to the specification, the new price was around € 188,000, which underlines the extensive equipment of this example.

With its combination of performance, luxury and open-top driving pleasure, the Porsche 911 Carrera Cabriolet is one of the most coveted sports cars of the moment.

This 2024 example comes from the first owner and is in almost new condition thanks to its very low mileage of only 5,600 kilometers. The car is finished in the exclusive color Racetrack Grey / Kreide (Crayon) and has a full leather interior.

The car is equipped with various popular options, including the front axle lift system and Matrix LED lighting. This equipment increases both ease of use and comfort during daily use and sporty rides.

With its combination of performance, luxury, exclusivity and open-top driving pleasure, this Porsche represents the best of the modern 911 generation.
